chunks.text: BEARS 2018 FAQ - EECS at Berkeley BEARS 2018 FAQ Are there ID requirements to enter the event? There are no ID requirements to enter this event. Room capacity is set at 200. Once we reach capacity, we will create a waitlist ticket option only. What are my transportation/parking options for getting to and from the event? Public Transportation is highly encouraged due to limited parking options on campus. Directions to Sibley Auditorium How can I contact the organizer with any questions? Please contact bears-admin@eecs.berkeley.edu for all inquiries. What’s the refund policy? You may receive a refund, excluding the service fee, up to 1 day before the event. < BEARS 2018 Directions BEARS 2018 Videos > View Open Faculty Positions
